parameters.query:
INSERT INTO ct_users (phone, name, document_id, registered, terms_at, source)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.phone }}',
  '{{ $json.name }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.document_id }}', 'null'),
  '{{ $json.terms_accepted }}' = 'true',
  CASE WHEN '{{ $json.terms_accepted }}' = 'true' THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END,
  'whatsapp'
)
ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET
  name = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.name }}' <> '' THEN '{{ $json.name }}' ELSE ct_users.name END,
  document_id = CASE WHEN NULLIF('{{ $json.document_id }}', 'null') IS NOT NULL
    THEN NULLIF('{{ $json.document_id }}', 'null') ELSE ct_users.document_id END,
  registered = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.terms_accepted }}' = 'true' THEN true ELSE ct_users.registered END,
  terms_at = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.terms_accepted }}' = 'true' AND ct_users.registered = false THEN NOW() ELSE ct_users.terms_at END,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING user_id, name, registered, total_goals
